title: pittosporum balfourii
intro: Pittosporum balfourii, also known as the Himalayan or Kohat pittosporum, is a deciduous shrub native to the Himalayan region. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Pittosporum balfourii include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Pittosporum balfourii typically include infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from the leaves and bark, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
